    "Conductors are undersized for the load and run length, causing excessive voltage drop."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Calculate the required conductor size based on load current and circuit length to limit voltage drop to under 3% for branch circuits (or 5% overall).",
    "Select and stage the correct larger gauge wire using NEC Table 310.16 and voltage drop formulas before beginning installation."
  ],
  "rationale": "The existing or staged conductors are undersized for the combined load and length of the run, which will cause excessive voltage drop, poor equipment performance, and potential overheating. The work must be halted at the staged phase to swap the materials for correctly sized conductors.",

    "NEC Table 310.16",
